text: 🇧🇾 "God forbid they commit aggression against Belarus"— Lukashenko warns NATO neighbors Belarusian President Lukashenko issued a direct warning to Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, and Ukraine: Belarus will not initiate war, but will defend itself "by all possible means" if provoked. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇾 “上帝保佑他们不要对白俄罗斯发动侵略”——卢卡申科警告北约邻国。白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科向爱沙尼亚、拉脱维亚、立陶宛、波兰和乌克兰发出直接警告：白俄罗斯不会发动战争，但如果受到挑衅，将“尽一切可能”进行自卫。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Yedioth Ahronoth: Trump wants to concede to Iran's demands with the aim of holding negotiations and lift the blockade of Iran's sea ports 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ The families of the children of Minab School sent a letter to Pope Leo XIV, thanking him for his efforts to promote peace, and asked him to be the voice of their voiceless children. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Open Source Intel Iran may send a delegation to Islamabad this week for a second round of talks, according to two Pakistani officials. Both Iranian and U.S. delegations could attend. Pakistan declined to disclose travel details for security reasons. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据两名巴基斯坦官员称，伊朗可能在本周派遣代表团前往伊斯兰堡进行第二轮会谈。伊朗和美国代表团都可能出席。出于安全考虑，巴基斯坦拒绝透露行程细节。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Esmail Ghaani, the head of the IRGC Quds Force (who has largely been absent from public view since and during the war) visited Iraq recently https://twitter.com/michaelh992/status/2046196923535589433/photo/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix What happened is a complete mystery…./ With the entire city slowly being covered in burned oil residue, residents of Russia's shit-bucket town of Tuapse cry "Why? Why is this happening" as they try to wash the oil from their skin, cars and homes. While driving to the gym, one woman has even lost the will to live, saying "why even have this toned ass?" - Jay in Kyiv tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯：发生的事情完全是个谜……/ 随着整个城市慢慢被燃烧的石油残渣覆盖，俄罗斯图阿普谢这个烂摊子城镇的居民哭喊着“为什么？为什么会发生这种事”，同时试图洗掉皮肤、汽车和房屋上的油污。在开车去健身房的路上，一名女子甚至失去了活下去的意志，说“为什么还要练这紧致的屁股？” - 基辅的杰伊 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 China’s President Xi Jinping: “The Strait of Hormuz should remain open for normal passage, as this serves the common interests of regional countries and the international community. China calls for an immediate and comprehensive ceasefire, supports all efforts aimed at restoring peace, and insists that disputes be resolved through political and diplomatic means.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 中国国家主席习近平：“霍尔木兹海峡应保持正常通行，这符合地区国家和国际社会的共同利益。中国呼吁立即全面停火，支持一切旨在恢复和平的努力，并坚持通过政治和外交手段解决争端。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🔸 Hormuz, the story of a strait 🔸 🔻 "We don't have international waters in the Persian Gulf. Rather, we have an international water way." Watch the full documentary @PresstvDoc 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's armed forces will take necessary action against the terrorist US army Spokesman for the Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters: 🔸 Following the blatant assault by US terrorist commandos on an Iranian commercial vessel in the waters of the Sea of Oman, the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran were prepared for a decisive response against the aggressing US forces — however, due to the presence of some crew members' families aboard the vessel, they were constrained in order to protect the lives and safety of those who were in constant danger. 🔸 Given the current circumstances, once the safety of the families and crew of the vessel targeted by US aggression is secured, the mighty armed forces of Islamic Iran will take the necessary action against the terrorist US army. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗武装部队将对恐怖主义美军采取必要行动。哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人：🔸 在美国恐怖主义突击队公然袭击阿曼海海域的一艘伊朗商船后，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队已准备好对侵略的美军进行果断回击——然而，由于船上载有部分船员的家属，为了保护这些处于持续危险中的人员的生命安全，他们受到了限制。🔸 鉴于当前情况，一旦遭到美国侵略的船只上的家属和船员的安全得到保障，强大的伊朗伊斯兰武装部队将对恐怖主义美军采取必要行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Normalization of transit through the Strait of Hormuz is not possible Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️The primary cause of the crisis in the Strait of Hormuz is the military aggression of the US and the Zionist regime since March 28, and…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Iran harbors no enmity toward regional countries Cooperating with the aggressors is a fatal analytical error Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ Iran harbors no enmity toward regional countries, and the actions of the past 40 days have been solely legitimate defense against the military aggression of the US and the Zionist regime. 🔸️ Ignoring the reality that the logistical facilities of certain neighboring countries have been placed at the disposal of the aggressors is a "fatal analytical error." 🔸️ Going along with the expansionist policies of the Zionist regime and ignoring its hegemonic objectives will have irreversible consequences for the entire region. 🔸️ Regional countries must, rather than deflecting responsibility, prevent enemies from exploiting their soil against their neighbors. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：霍尔木兹海峡的过境正常化是不可能的。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️霍尔木兹海峡危机的首要原因是自3月28日以来美国和犹太复国主义政权的军事侵略，以及……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：伊朗对地区国家没有敌意。与侵略者合作是一个致命的分析错误。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️伊朗对地区国家没有敌意，过去40天的行动仅仅是针对美国和犹太复国主义政权军事侵略的合法防御。🔸️忽视某些邻国的后勤设施已被提供给侵略者这一事实是一个“致命的分析错误”。🔸️顺从犹太复国主义政权的扩张主义政策并忽视其霸权目标，将给整个地区带来不可逆转的后果。🔸️地区国家必须防止敌人利用其领土对付邻国，而不是推卸责任。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Pakistan is the sole official mediator in the negotiations Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️At present, Pakistan is the only official mediator in the diplomatic process between Iran and the US. While other countries are also in contact and…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Normalization of transit through the Strait of Hormuz is not possible Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The primary cause of the crisis in the Strait of Hormuz is the military aggression of the US and the Zionist regime since March 28, and responsibility for the current situation lies directly with them. 🔸️ Given the repeated ceasefire violations and US threats against Iranian ports and vessels, the situation continues to be regarded as a "state of war," and unilateral normalization of transit is not possible — particularly as the insecurity created has also deterred insurance companies and cargo owners from passage. 🔸️ The Islamic Republic of Iran, taking a responsible approach, has placed on its agenda the drafting of new security protocols to guarantee lasting safety in the future and prevent the recurrence of acts of aggression. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：巴基斯坦是谈判中唯一的官方调解人。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️目前，巴基斯坦是伊朗与美国外交进程中唯一的官方调解人。虽然其他国家也在接触和……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：霍尔木兹海峡的过境正常化是不可能的。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️霍尔木兹海峡危机的首要原因是自3月28日以来美国和犹太复国主义政权的军事侵略，当前局势的责任直接由他们承担。🔸️鉴于多次违反停火协议以及美国对伊朗港口和船只的威胁，局势仍被视为“战争状态”，单方面实现过境正常化是不可能的——特别是由于所造成的动荡也阻碍了保险公司和货主通行。🔸️伊朗伊斯兰共和国采取负责任的态度，已将起草新的安全协议列入议程，以确保未来的持久安全并防止侵略行为再次发生。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 The Guardian: A US defence contractor evacuated around 100 workers from Iraq earlier this month after instructions from the US government to reduce personnel in Erbil. The move comes amid growing security concerns for contractors operating in Iraq and neighbouring Kuwait as regional tensions escalate. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 《卫报》：一家美国国防承包商本月初在接到美国政府减少埃尔比勒人员的指示后，从伊拉克撤离了约100名工人。随着地区紧张局势升级，此举是在伊拉克和邻国科威特运营的承包商面临日益严重的安全担忧之际做出的。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Sunni scholar Hassan Moraib: "Lebanon needs to admit it lost the war. Iran is a cancer in Lebanon. It must be removed." Moraib accused Hizbullah of putting its own people at risk by storing weapons in displaced civilians' centers. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046186719628632508/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩逊尼派学者哈桑·莫莱布（Hassan Moraib）：“黎巴嫩需要承认它输掉了战争。伊朗是黎巴嫩的毒瘤。必须将其切除。”莫莱布指责真主党通过在流离失所的平民中心储存武器，将自己的人民置于危险之中。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046186719628632508/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 The U.S. State Department says it is suspending all consular services in Iraq, citing concerns that elements within the Iraqi government are shielding Iran aligned militia groups. tweet

text: Nuno Felix Our enemies are out there trying to discredit Europe. Probably controversial, but I genuinely believe that within the next 5 years: 🇪🇸 Spain 🇫🇷 France 🇩🇪 Germany And most Schengen countries allowing mass illegal immigration will lose freedom of mobility within member states. The entire EU project doesn’t make any sense and European passports will be tragically devalued as this trend accelerates. - Alex Recouso tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 我们的敌人正在外面试图抹黑欧洲。这可能很有争议，但我真心认为在未来5年内：🇪🇸 西班牙 🇫🇷 法国 🇩🇪 德国以及大多数允许大规模非法移民的申根国家将失去成员国之间的自由流动权。整个欧盟项目毫无意义，随着这一趋势加速，欧洲护照的价值将悲剧性地贬值。- Alex Recouso 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Transfer of nuclear stockpiles was never a negotiating option Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️At no stage of the current or previous negotiations has the transfer of Iran's enriched uranium stockpiles to the US or any other country been…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Pakistan is the sole official mediator in the negotiations Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ At present, Pakistan is the only official mediator in the diplomatic process between Iran and the US. While other countries are also in contact and consultation, the credibility of the mediation institution depends on both parties honoring their commitments. 🔸️ America's repeated betrayals of diplomatic processes over the past year have not only dealt a blow to the resolution of differences, but by undermining the credibility of the mediating party, have also called into question the recognized principles of international law and the world's peaceful dispute-resolution instruments. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：转移核储备从未成为谈判选项。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️在当前或之前的谈判的任何阶段，将伊朗的浓缩铀储备转移到美国或任何其他国家从未……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：巴基斯坦是谈判中唯一的官方调解人。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️目前，巴基斯坦是伊朗与美国外交进程中唯一的官方调解人。虽然其他国家也在接触和磋商，但调解机构的信誉取决于双方是否履行承诺。🔸️美国过去一年在外交进程中的反复背信弃义，不仅打击了分歧的解决，而且通过破坏调解方的信誉，也使国际法公认的原则和世界和平解决争端的工具受到质疑。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz is lawful ➡️Responsibility for the energy crisis lies with the aggressors Foreign Ministry spokesman, responding to Tasnim: 🔸️Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz are fully compliant with international…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Transfer of nuclear stockpiles was never a negotiating option Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ At no stage of the current or previous negotiations has the transfer of Iran's enriched uranium stockpiles to the US or any other country been raised — this option is fundamentally not on the agenda of the Islamic Republic of Iran. 🔸️ The country's definitive position is the preservation of its nuclear achievements on Iranian soil, and all claims made in this regard are categorically denied. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制是合法的 ➡️能源危机的责任在于侵略者。外交部发言人回应塔斯尼姆通讯社：🔸️伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的行动完全符合国际……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：转移核储备从未成为谈判选项。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️在当前或之前的谈判的任何阶段，将伊朗的浓缩铀储备转移到美国或任何其他国家从未被提出——这一选项从根本上就不在伊朗伊斯兰共和国的议程上。🔸️该国的明确立场是保留其在伊朗领土上的核成就，所有关于此事的说法都被断然否认。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Iran remains firm on its principled positions in the negotiations Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️In response to the US 15-point proposal, Iran submitted a 10-point counter-proposal which, following extensive talks in Islamabad and a mediation…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz is lawful ➡️ Responsibility for the energy crisis lies with the aggressors Foreign Ministry spokesman, responding to Tasnim: 🔸️ Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz are fully compliant with international law and fall within the framework of "legitimate defense." 🔸️ Since the US has used its military bases in the region to direct and support military aggression against Iranian territory, Iran has the right under international law to adopt deterrent measures in its territorial waters. 🔸️ Blaming Iran for the losses suffered by other countries is misdirected — responsibility for the economic and security consequences of this situation lies directly with the aggressors, namely the US and the Zionist regime, which have targeted regional stability. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：伊朗在谈判中坚持其原则立场。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️针对美国的15点提议，伊朗提交了一份10点反提议，在伊斯兰堡进行广泛会谈和调解……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制是合法的 ➡️能源危机的责任在于侵略者。外交部发言人回应塔斯尼姆通讯社：🔸️伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的行动完全符合国际法，属于“合法防御”的范畴。🔸️由于美国利用其在该地区的军事基地来指导和支持针对伊朗领土的军事侵略，伊朗根据国际法有权在其领海采取威慑措施。🔸️将其他国家遭受的损失归咎于伊朗是错误的——这种情况造成的经济和安全后果的责任直接由侵略者承担，即美国和犹太复国主义政权，他们破坏了地区稳定。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 The commander of the IRGC’s Quds Force, Esmail Qaani, said after a visit to Baghdad that the formation of a government in Iraq is the right of the Iraqi people. “Iraq is too great for others – especially anti‑humanity criminals – to interfere in its affairs. The choice of prime minister will be made solely based on an Iraqi decision,” he stated. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 伊斯兰革命卫队圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼在访问巴格达后表示，在伊拉克组建政府是伊拉克人民的权利。“伊拉克太伟大了，不容许他人——尤其是反人类罪犯——干涉其事务。总理的选择将完全基于伊拉克的决定，”他表示。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 The Guardian : A US defence contractor evacuated around 100 workers from Iraq earlier this month after instructions from the US government to reduce personnel in Erbil. The move comes amid growing security concerns for contractors operating in Iraq and neighbouring Kuwait as regional tensions escalate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 《卫报》：一家美国国防承包商本月初在接到美国政府减少埃尔比勒人员的指示后，从伊拉克撤离了约100名工人。随着地区紧张局势升级，此举是在伊拉克和邻国科威特运营的承包商面临日益严重的安全担忧之际做出的。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: The armed forces will respond to any new adventurism Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️The Islamic Republic of Iran does not recognize any deadlines or ultimatums in securing its national interests. 🔸️Iran did not start this war, and the…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Iran remains firm on its principled positions in the negotiations Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ In response to the US 15-point proposal, Iran submitted a 10-point counter-proposal which, following extensive talks in Islamabad and a mediation visit to Tehran, was developed into a concrete package. 🔸️ Unlike the other side — which obstructs progress through constantly shifting positions and media posturing — the Islamic Republic of Iran stands firm on its reasonable and fair positions. 🔸️ We have clearly stated our red lines and non-negotiable items from the outset, and insistence on them will not alter our principled positions. 🔸️ Furthermore, much of the detail published in the media is purely speculative and has not been confirmed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：武装部队将对任何新的冒险主义做出回应。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️伊朗伊斯兰共和国在维护其国家利益方面不承认任何最后期限或最后通牒。🔸️伊朗没有发动这场战争，而且……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：伊朗在谈判中坚持其原则立场。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️针对美国的15点提议，伊朗提交了一份10点反提议，在伊斯兰堡进行广泛会谈和调解访问德黑兰后，该提议被发展成一个具体的方案。🔸️与另一方不同——另一方通过不断改变立场和媒体作秀来阻碍进展——伊朗伊斯兰共和国坚定地坚持其合理和公平的立场。🔸️我们从一开始就明确说明了我们的红线和不可谈判的项目，坚持这些项目不会改变我们的原则立场。🔸️此外，媒体公布的许多细节纯属猜测，尚未得到证实。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: The US is the primary party responsible for insecurity in the Strait of Hormuz Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️The tensions in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz are solely the result of military actions by the US and the Zionist…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: The armed forces will respond to any new adventurism Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The Islamic Republic of Iran does not recognize any deadlines or ultimatums in securing its national interests. 🔸️ Iran did not start this war, and the military operations in June and March 2026 were carried out solely in legitimate defense of the country's sovereignty. 🔸️ The protection of national interests will continue for as long as necessary, and in the event of any new adventurism by the US or the Zionist regime, the armed forces will respond with full force and resolve. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：美国是霍尔木兹海峡不安全的主要责任方。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势完全是美国和犹太复国主义者的军事行动造成的……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：武装部队将对任何新的冒险主义作出回应。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️伊朗伊斯兰共和国不承认任何以牺牲其国家利益为代价的最后期限或通牒。🔸️伊朗没有发动这场战争，2026年6月和3月的军事行动完全是为了合法捍卫国家主权。🔸️保护国家利益的工作将根据需要持续进行，如果美国或犹太复国主义政权进行任何新的冒险，武装部队将以全力和决心作出回应。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: The government will not forget America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️It is impossible to forget the costly experiences of the past year and America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy. 🔸️In less than 9…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: The US is the primary party responsible for insecurity in the Strait of Hormuz Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The tensions in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz are solely the result of military actions by the US and the Zionist regime. 🔸️ Prior to February 28, the region enjoyed complete security. The international community must therefore hold these two actors accountable for destabilizing the region and avoid swapping the roles of "perpetrator" and "victim." 🔸️ Regarding the incident in question, competent authorities are currently conducting a thorough investigation into its dimensions, and results will be announced subsequently. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：政府不会忘记美国对外交的反复背叛。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️不可能忘记过去一年代价高昂的经历以及美国对外交的反复背叛。🔸️在不到9个月的时间里……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：美国是霍尔木兹海峡不安全的主要责任方。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势完全是美国和犹太复国主义政权的军事行动造成的。🔸️在2月28日之前，该地区享有完全的安全。因此，国际社会必须追究这两个行为体破坏地区稳定的责任，并避免颠倒“肇事者”和“受害者”的角色。🔸️关于所涉事件，主管当局目前正在对其各个方面进行彻底调查，结果将随后公布。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Baqaei: Attack on Iranian commercial vessel constitutes an act of aggression Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️The US, through contradictory behavior and continuous violations of ceasefire terms, has shown it lacks seriousness in pursuing the diplomatic…" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: The government will not forget America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ It is impossible to forget the costly experiences of the past year and America's repeated betrayals of diplomacy. 🔸️ In less than 9 months, Washington twice attacked Iran's sovereignty during ongoing negotiations — violating international law, killing senior figures and civilians, and damaging national assets. 🔸️ Accordingly, all pillars of the system are monitoring developments with full vigilance, as guarding against the enemy's plots within the diplomatic process is a rational duty — and even more vital than during wartime. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 巴盖伊：对伊朗商船的袭击构成侵略行为。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️美国通过矛盾的行为和持续违反停火条款，表明其在追求外交方面缺乏诚意……” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：政府不会忘记美国对外交的反复背叛。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️不可能忘记过去一年代价高昂的经历以及美国对外交的反复背叛。🔸️在不到9个月的时间里，华盛顿在谈判进行期间两次侵犯伊朗主权——违反国际法，杀害高级官员和平民，并破坏国家资产。🔸️因此，国家的所有支柱都在保持高度警惕地监测事态发展，因为在外交进程中防范敌人的阴谋是一项理性的职责——甚至比战时更为重要。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 Esmaeil Baqaei, spokesman for the Iranian Foreign Ministry: We have no plan for the next round of negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics" 🇮🇷 Baqaei: Attack on Iranian commercial vessel constitutes an act of aggression Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman: 🔸️ The US, through contradictory behavior and continuous violations of ceasefire terms, has shown it lacks seriousness in pursuing the diplomatic process. 🔸️ Washington's recent actions — including breaking commitments on Lebanon and attempts to impose a naval blockade on Iran that led to an attack on an Iranian commercial vessel — constitute a clear "act of aggression" under UN resolutions. 🔸️ This glaring contradiction between words and actions deepens the Iranian people's distrust of US intentions. Iran will therefore make the appropriate decision regarding the continuation of the negotiations track, prioritizing national interests and considerations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们没有下一轮谈判的计划。🔴 @DDGeopolitics” 🇮🇷 巴盖伊：对伊朗商船的袭击构成侵略行为。伊朗外交部发言人：🔸️美国通过矛盾的行为和持续违反停火条款，表明其在追求外交进程方面缺乏诚意。🔸️华盛顿近期的行动——包括违背在黎巴嫩问题上的承诺，以及试图对伊朗实施海上封锁导致袭击伊朗商船——根据联合国决议，构成了明确的“侵略行为”。🔸️这种言行之间明显的矛盾加深了伊朗人民对美国意图的不信任。因此，伊朗将根据国家利益和考量，就谈判进程的延续作出适当决定。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Esmaeil Baqaei, spokesman for the Iranian Foreign Ministry: We have no plan for the next round of negotiations. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们没有下一轮谈判的计划。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 Sever-V Brigade operators spotted a Ukrainian self-propelled gun moving through their area of responsibility, tracked it to a concealed position, and cracked it open with FPV drone strikes — forcing the crew to relocate. The SPG drove straight into another trap. Drone operators followed its every move and hit it again at the new position, destroying it. Vid: @Sever_Z 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 “北方-V”旅的操作员发现一门乌克兰自行火炮在其责任区内移动，追踪其至隐蔽位置，并用FPV无人机打击将其击毁，迫使乘员转移。该自行火炮直接驶入了另一个陷阱。无人机操作员跟踪了它的一举一动，并在新位置再次击中它，将其摧毁。视频：@Sever_Z 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Polish Foreign Minister Sikorski: IDF soldiers themselves admit to war crimes. They killed not only civilian Palestinians but even their own hostages.
text_zh: 波兰外交部长西科尔斯基：以色列国防军士兵自己承认犯下了战争罪。他们不仅杀害了巴勒斯坦平民，甚至还杀害了他们自己的人质。

text: Xi Jinping: The Strait of Hormuz should remain open for normal passage, which aligns with the common interest of countries in the region and the international community.
text_zh: 习近平：霍尔木兹海峡应保持正常通行，这符合地区国家和国际社会的共同利益。

text: Michael A. Horowitz US pressuring Iraq? Al-Hadah reports that the US has stopped shipping dollars to Iraq's central bank until the new government is formed in Baghdad. Sources quoted by al-Hadath also reported that the US suspended security coordination meetings until a government is formed and those responsible for the bombing of the US embassy and the logistics support base at Baghdad International are identified tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：美国向伊拉克施压？据《阿拉伯汇》报道，美国已停止向伊拉克中央银行运送美元，直到巴格达组建新政府。据《阿拉伯汇》援引的消息人士称，美国还暂停了安全协调会议，直到政府组建完毕，并查明对巴格达大使馆和巴格达国际机场后勤支援基地爆炸事件负责的人员。推文

text: Visioner ✈️ 🇩🇪 The German Ministry of Defense announced the transfer on April 16 by the company Airbus Defence and Space of the 53rd A400M Atlas military transport aircraft for the country's national air force, thus completing the entire procurement program and marking the end of an 11-year delivery cycle. It is noted that the aircraft will be part of the 62nd Transport Aviation Squadron of the German Air Force. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ✈️ 🇩🇪 德国国防部宣布，空中客车防务与航天公司已于4月16日向该国空军交付了第53架A400M“阿特拉斯”军用运输机，从而完成了整个采购计划，标志着为期11年的交付周期结束。据悉，该飞机将编入德国空军第62运输航空中队。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel London Metropolitan Police arrested two suspects in the arson of a northeast London synagogue last Saturday night. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伦敦大都会警察局逮捕了两名涉嫌上周六晚在伦敦东北部纵火焚烧犹太教堂的嫌疑人。推文

text: Open Source Intel ALERT 🔴 U.S. Embassy Baghdad warns Iranian-aligned Iraqi militias are plotting attacks on U.S. citizens and targets across Iraq. Some Iraqi government elements are providing cover for the militias. Iraqi airspace has reopened but missile, drone, and rocket threats remain. Level 4: "Do not travel to Iraq for any reason. Leave now if you are there." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：警报 🔴 美国驻巴格达大使馆警告称，伊朗支持的伊拉克民兵正在策划针对伊拉克境内美国公民和目标的袭击。一些伊拉克政府成员正在为这些民兵提供掩护。伊拉克领空已重新开放，但导弹、无人机和火箭弹威胁依然存在。4级警告：“无论出于何种原因，请勿前往伊拉克。如果您在那里，请立即离开。”推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Chinese President Xi Jinping held a phone call with Saudi Arabia’s Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. He told MbS that China “advocates for an immediate and comprehensive ceasefire.” tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：中国国家主席习近平与沙特阿拉伯王储穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼通电话。他告诉穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼，中国“主张立即实现全面停火”。推文

text: Pakistan’s army chief Asim Munir told Trump that the U.S. blockade of Iranian ports is blocking renewed U.S.–Iran talks. Trump said he would consider it. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔告诉特朗普，美国对伊朗港口的封锁阻碍了美伊重启谈判。特朗普表示会考虑此事。来源：路透社

text: Open Source Intel UPDATE 🔴 First tsunami waves reached Japan's coast. The largest wave recorded so far measured 80cm, according to Japan's meteorological agency. JUST IN 🔴 A 7.4 magnitude earthquake struck northern Japan, triggering a tsunami warning. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：更新 🔴 第一波海啸已抵达日本海岸。据日本气象厅称，目前记录到的最大海浪为80厘米。突发 🔴 日本北部发生7.4级地震，引发海啸预警。- 开源情报 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @LahavHarkov : Ceasefires deepen Israeli divisions over Trump’s handling of war The most recent poll on the matter, taken before the Lebanon ceasefire was announced, found that 51% of Israelis oppose a ceasefire with Hezbollah and only 29% support it. Nearly half (48%) of Israels do not trust President Donald Trump to consider Israeli interests in negotiations with Iran, while 33% do. https://jewishinsider.com/2026/04/israel-u-s-iran-lebanon-trump-hezbollah-netanyahu-ceasefire/ tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：转发 @LahavHarkov：停火加深了以色列在特朗普处理战争方式上的分歧。在黎巴嫩停火宣布前进行的最新民调显示，51%的以色列人反对与真主党停火，只有29%的人支持。近一半（48%）的以色列人不信任唐纳德·特朗普总统在与伊朗的谈判中会考虑以色列的利益，而33%的人表示信任。https://jewishinsider.com/2026/04/israel-u-s-iran-lebanon-trump-hezbollah-netanyahu-ceasefire/ 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @mahdijasimg : My understanding of this is the UAE may be mitigation-planning for a potential prolonged or repeated crisis. Emirati officials haven’t formally requested a swap line per the report, but perhaps floated the idea as a potential need if things get worse. https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/u-a-e-asks-u-s-about-a-wartime-financial-lifeline-MbVTaBYM28mVhLTGaRTH tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：转发 @mahdijasimg：据我理解，阿联酋可能是在为潜在的长期或反复危机进行缓解规划。据报道，阿联酋官员尚未正式要求建立货币互换额度，但可能已经提出如果局势恶化，这可能是一种潜在需求。https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/u-a-e-asks-u-s-about-a-wartime-financial-lifeline-MbVTaBYM28mVhLTGaRTH 推文

text: Netanyahu posted a long statement trying to explain how much Israel loves Christians after an IDF soldier smashed a statue of Jesus in Lebanon.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡发表了一份长篇声明，试图解释以色列有多么热爱基督徒，此前一名以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩砸毁了一尊耶稣雕像。
